131.reason: [This printf is inside the loop, causing a newline after each connected component. Since the graph is connected (per problem statement), this may not break correctness in simple cases, but more critically, when a vertex is deleted, the traversal should still output only one line. However, the real issue is that the BFS function does not maintain ascending order of adjacent vertices because insertEdge appends edges at the end instead of inserting in sorted order, violating requirement #3.]
